description: Rows with matching colored endpoints become solid horizontal lines of that color. Rows with different endpoint colors are unchanged.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_22eb0ac0(I):
    x1 = fgpartition(I)
    x2 = fork(recolor, color, backdrop)
    x3 = apply(x2, x1)
    x4 = mfilter(x3, hline)
    O = paint(I, x4)
    return O
